regional_cost_note: Steel fabricators in Whangārei typically charge $130–$260/m for structural beams installed and $400–$950/m for balustrades. Steel portal frame buildings run $38,000–$85,000+. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Always verify the fabricator holds current IQP or SCNZ certification for structural work.
